name: sdd-harness
description: Project- and stack-agnostic Spec-Driven Development harness for Claude Code. Ships the sdd-feature-flow dynamic workflow (route -> clarify -> validated OpenSpec change -> human approval gate -> implement one-at-a-time -> validate -> forced-greptile review -> signed PR to trunk), the sdd-openspec enforcer agent, the sdd-clarify front-door and pre-pr-greptile skills, and SDD gate hooks (block code before an approved spec, nudge, test gate). Auto-detects Python vs JS/TS tooling; delegates e2e eval to a per-project script. Requires the caveman plugin (compressed investigator/reviewer subagents); pairs with engram (persistent memory).
